content: TS5 standard decorators vs experimental: Standard (TC39 Stage 3) = signature (value, context), no emitDecoratorMetadata, no reflect-metadata, no parameter decorators, built-in context.metadata. Works out-of-box without tsconfig flags. Legacy experimental decorators = (target, key, descriptor) signature, requires experimentalDecorators+emitDecoratorMetadata flags, powers NestJS/Angular/typegoose. The two are INCOMPATIBLE. For ODM type inference from TS types at runtime, legacy + emitDecoratorMetadata is required. For pure metadata decoration (@Pre, @Optional, @Pattern with explicit values), standard decorators work fine. New projects: use standard decorators, avoid legacy dependency.
